escalation.rationale: US-Israel war on Iran enters day 15 with attacks on oil facilities, embassy strikes, and Strait of Hormuz blockade causing global shipping crisis.

ticker_items: US attacks Iran's Kharg oil island as Tehran threatens retaliation
US Embassy Baghdad hit by missile, helipad damaged
Israel kills 12 medics in southern Lebanon strike
Strait of Hormuz shipping drops 90% amid blockade
French soldier killed in Iraq attack

middle_east.description: US strikes military sites on Iran's Kharg island, home to vast oil facilities.
US Embassy in Baghdad targeted with missile strike hitting helipad.
Israeli attack kills 12 medical personnel including doctors, paramedics and nurses.
Israel conducts targeted killing attempt in areas of Beirut not previously hit in conflict.

claimed_totals.claim: Total deaths in US-Israel Iran war
claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 in Iran, 15 in Israel, 11 US soldiers, 19 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: Watch what happens today to these crazy scoundrels
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Nearly all German tourists evacuated from Middle East. Hundreds more Lufthansa flights cancelled due to regional instability.
French soldier killed in attack in Kurdish region of northern Iraq. President Macron leading efforts for international naval escorts to reopen Strait of Hormuz.
Congress criticizes government for co-sponsoring UN resolution condemning Iran. Former air chief emphasizes need for stronger air defense systems based on West Asia conflict lessons.

financial.notes: Oil prices remain above $100 despite temporary US waiver on Russian oil sanctions as Strait of Hormuz blockade continues.

update_log.text: US attacks military sites on Iran's Kharg island containing major oil facilities
Missile strike hits US Embassy Baghdad helipad causing damage
Israel kills 12 medical workers in southern Lebanon attack
French soldier confirmed killed in northern Iraq attack
Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic down 90% due to Iranian blockade
